channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Dell’s new XPS 14 is better in almost every way
item.description: The 2026 XPS 14 is the best premium laptop we've seen from Dell in a while, with incredible build quality in a thin machine and good performance thanks to Intel's Core Ultra Series 3 "Panther Lake" chips. A bonus: Dell killed its lame "Premium Plus" naming scheme. XPS is so back! I can't believe how […]

item.title: Hacked, leaked, and held for ransom: the worst breaches of 2026 so far
item.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.

item.title: Avec 200€ de moins, ce puissant laptop 2-en-1 (écran OLED 2,8K et Ultra 7) est un excellent deal
item.description: Si vous cherchez un laptop performant, le Lenovo Yoga 7 2-in-1 16ILL10 pourrait bien vous plaire : avec son format hybride ultra-pratique au quotidien, son sublime écran OLED et sa puce Intel Core Ultra 7, ce modèle qui ne manque pas de puissance est en promotion à 1 199 euros au lieu de 1 399 euros

item.title: 'We're really drawing a line in the sand': New York could be the first state to put a temporary ban on large data centers
item.description: New York state has taken another step closer to stopping large data center development for the next year.

item.title: How to get your money's worth from YouTube Premium
item.description: If you're going to spend about $20 a month anyway, here's how to make sure you're doing more than just avoiding ads.

item.title: Kill some time with these much needed distractions
item.description: Constantly being plugged into the news grind is mentally exhausting. Sometimes we just need to take a break, unwind, and do something fun. That’s why we’ve built up a collection of distracting time-wasters for when we need a break from being obsessively online. We figured you might enjoy these harmless rabbit holes, mildly addictive browser […]

item.title: How to watch WWDC 2026 — and what announcements to expect
item.description: It's almost time for WWDC 2026, where we're expecting Apple to show off iOS 27 and other software updates.

item.title: ‘It ticks many boxes’: this Joy-Con 2 charging dock is simple and effective — but if you’re after more features, you’ll be disappointed
item.description: Looking for a simple grip and charging solution for your Joy-Con 2s? Look no further than this Genki accessory.

item.title: How to watch Interview With The Vampire season 3 online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how to watch Interview With The Vampire season 3 online from anywhere in the world, completely FREE as Lestat de Lioncourt dives into rock and roll.

item.title: What is the release date for Clarkson's Farm season 5 episodes 5-6 on Prime Video?
item.description: One health scare, Corrs performance and Christmas period down, what's next for Jezza? And when do Clarkson's Farm season 5 episodes 5-6 come to Prime Video?

item.title: PlayStation's massive Days of Play sale ends soon — here are the 35 best deals on controllers, games, PS Plus, PSVR, and more
item.description: As a huge PS5 fan, I've rounded up what I think are the best deals from this year's Days of Play sale, including discounts of up to 50% on controllers, games, PS Plus, PSVR, and more.
